attributes.action:
Make PMQ's answers manditory.
We are sick of PM refusing to answer questions.
attributes.additional_details: The PM is failing in his duty by refusing to answer questions making a mockery of the government. How can we trust a PM that can not communicate what the people want to know? Continued word salads of irrelevant subjects must be brought to an end. Refusal to answer questions should lead to removal from the position.
attributes.background: The PM is asked questions that matter. Refusal to answer is not acceptable. Refusal to answer shows he is frightened of telling the truth to the people.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Introduce standards for answers to PMQs to be enforced by the Speaker
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762566
